goal: Produce an evidence-backed deep autopsy report for Vitra Engine PDF and Reader architecture.
deliverable: Chinese markdown report with verdict matrix, root-cause analysis, and traceable evidence.
constraints: Do not overwrite ongoing user refactor work.
No silent fallback in analysis conclusions.
Separate current working tree facts from HEAD snapshot facts.
acceptance_criteria: At least 2 additional findings are documented.
Report explicitly notes that pdfProvider.ts is deleted in the working tree.
Requirement, plan, phase, and cleanup artifacts are written.
non_goals: No direct rewrite of PDF rendering implementation.
No claim that build or tests pass.
No takeover of the in-progress PDF rebuild branch state.
open_questions: Whether the deleted working-tree pdfProvider.ts will be replaced by a split pdf/ module tree.
How much of the old PDF behavior is still live vs already replaced by current uncommitted work.
inference_notes: The user wants a report, not an immediate code patch.
The complaint targets both implementation quality and knowledge-system drift.
Existing rebuild artifacts suggest the repo is already reacting to the same class of problems.
